title: Magic Rainbow Spring Coil 7.5cm x 6.5cm Colourful Stretchy Bouncing Fidget Toy Ideal Kids Parties Gifts Party Bags Prizes, Perfect Sensory Toys for Autistic Children (7.5cm Magic Spring 1 Pack)
features: 🌈🌈🌈🌈 7.5CM SIZE RAINBOW MAGIC SPRING COIL TOY - This magic spring has to be seen to be believed. Diameter of 7.5cm and a coiled height of 6cm. As you can from the pictures, the spring is extra large! A fun and versatile tool that kids of all ages love. It is a fantastic visual toy, with bright colours. Because of its large size, the magic spring is incredibly strong and durable
🌈🌈🌈🌈PERFORMS A NUMBER OF FUN TRICKS - Throw it down the stairs or table tops. This rainbow spring provides entertainment for the whole family as a fiddle toy. Kids and adults love this awesome toy
🌈🌈🌈🌈 HOURS OF ADDICTIVE FUN WITH THE GIANT SPRINGY - Great fun for children and adults. A great fidget toy, it will be the toy that all the kids will want to play with. Imaginative play at its best

🌈🌈🌈🌈 SUPERB BIRTHDAY PRESENT OR STOCKING FILLER FOR BOYS OR GIRLS - 7.5cm x 6cm a great extra gift for a birthday or special occasion. Unique gift for a children's birthday party or as a party bag filler
🌈🌈🌈🌈 STACK UP the Rainbow Springy at the top of the stairs, tip it over, and watch it walk down stairs! Thanks to its strong spring action and weighty feel, this toy offers loads of fun for everyone
